summary: PWA Install App Button Feature - All tests passed. Install App button is visible and functional in both Customer Portal header and Admin Dashboard sidebar. Installation guide dialog opens with benefits (3 items) and installation steps (3 steps). Close button works correctly. PWA icons accessible at 192x192 and 512x512. Mobile and desktop views tested.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

action_items: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent for better accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: InstallAppButton.js properly handles PWA detection with window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)')
Component correctly hides when app is already installed as PWA (isInstalled check)
Three variants implemented: default (header), sidebar, sidebar-collapsed
Benefits and installation steps properly adapt based on device type (iOS, Android, Desktop)
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all button variants
RTL support implemented with isRTL prop
Dialog component uses shadcn/ui Dialog properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA Install App button feature is fully implemented and working. The button appears in Customer Portal header and Admin Dashboard sidebar. The installation guide dialog shows benefits (quick access, offline, faster) and device-specific installation steps. Button is hidden when app is already installed as PWA.

Installed App Detection.behavior: Button hidden when app is installed

mocked_apis.note: No APIs mocked - PWA is client-side feature
